nodes.label: OpenTesting Pipeline
nodes.description: Multi-stage test pipeline covering design, create, coverage, reporting, management for the CAA/MAA Joint Approval Workbench.

nodes.label: CAA/MAA Joint Approval Workbench
nodes.description: AI-assisted web service for BVLOS UAS swarm flight trial approval; system under test across the open-testing pipeline.

nodes.label: STRATEGY Pipeline (Test Design)
nodes.description: 8-agent STRATEGY pipeline (S-scope, T-technique, R-risk, A-approach, T-testability, E-estimation, G-governance, Y-yield) producing end-to-end test design.

nodes.label: CREATES Pipeline (Test Case Generation)
nodes.description: 7-agent CREATES pipeline (Context, Rules, Enumerate, Author, Trace, Export, Score) that authored 194 test cases.

nodes.label: COVERED Pipeline (Coverage Analysis)
nodes.description: 7-agent COVERED pipeline producing TMap coverage groups + ISO 25010 adequacy scoring.

nodes.label: REPORTS Pipeline (Test Reporting)
nodes.description: 7-agent REPORTS pipeline producing RAG dashboards and IEEE 829-2008 Master Test Reports.

nodes.label: MANAGES Pipeline (Process Compliance)
nodes.description: Management/compliance pipeline whose N_NORMING agent evaluates against 16 standards.

nodes.label: Boundary Value Analysis (BVA)
nodes.description: Test technique applied to pack size (500MB), geofence breach (10m/2s hysteresis), override latency (50ms vs 2s).

nodes.label: Equivalence Partitioning
nodes.description: Partition testing for valid/invalid pack sizes, formats, classification tiers.

nodes.label: Decision Table Testing
nodes.description: Used for keystone gate logic, Thorough Gate (FR-004), SORA assessment, readiness check (6 booleans -> 64 combos reduced via pairwise).

nodes.label: State Transition Testing
nodes.description: Used for phase flows, classification escalation OFFICIAL->SENSITIVE->SECRET, readiness dashboard state gating.

nodes.label: Use Case Testing
nodes.description: Use-case testing for applicant and regulator journeys.

nodes.label: Pairwise Testing
nodes.description: Reduces 2^6=64 readiness combinations to ~12 representative cases.

nodes.label: Scenario/E2E Testing
nodes.description: End-to-end scenarios such as applicant approval and SORA refusal twin-sample paths.

nodes.label: Exploratory Testing
nodes.description: Session-based exploratory testing represented by exploratory-charter template.

nodes.label: MCDC (Modified Condition/Decision Coverage)
nodes.description: 94% MCDC (decision/branch) coverage reported on Class A objects.

nodes.label: Statement Coverage
nodes.description: Code coverage (statement) 87% reported in synthetic retrospective.

nodes.label: Branch Coverage
nodes.description: Branch coverage 84% in synthetic retrospective; 94% decision/branch on Class A.

nodes.label: Path Coverage
nodes.description: Path coverage 90% via twin-sample regression <30min end-to-end.

nodes.label: State Coverage
nodes.description: 95% state coverage on classification escalation OFFICIAL->SENSITIVE->SECRET.

nodes.label: Boundary Coverage
nodes.description: 95% boundary coverage on pack/file sizes and geofence tolerance (+/-5m).

nodes.label: Keystone Coverage
nodes.description: Keystone coverage 100% (K1-K8 refuse SORA with confidence >=9).

nodes.label: WCAG 2.2 AA Accessibility Coverage
nodes.description: Accessibility coverage 100% against WCAG 2.2 AA.

nodes.label: Functional Requirement Coverage

nodes.label: IEEE 829-2008 MTR
nodes.description: Master Test Report format used for release-advice and final-test-report templates.

nodes.description: Defect classification standard; 100% conformant in compliance assessment.

nodes.label: XLUUV

nodes.label: JSP 520
nodes.description: UK MOD Ordnance, Munitions and Explosives Safety Management System (DSA 03.OME Part 1)

nodes.label: RAISO
nodes.description: Responsible AI Senior Officer per JSP 936

nodes.label: Meaningful Human Control
nodes.description: UK's position at UN CCW on autonomy; requires auditable autonomous-system decisions

nodes.label: Article 36
nodes.description: Additional Protocol I legal review of new weapons/means/methods of warfare

nodes.label: STANAG 4439
nodes.description: NATO policy for introduction and assessment of Insensitive Munitions

nodes.label: STANAG 4496
nodes.description: NATO Fragment Impact munitions test procedure

nodes.label: STANAG 2636
nodes.description: NATO data processing and output format for Arena Fragmentation Tests

nodes.label: Dstl
nodes.description: Defence Science and Technology Laboratory - UK MOD scientific research establishment

nodes.label: DAIC
nodes.description: Defence AI Centre - UK MOD AI capability development and assurance

nodes.label: DOSG
nodes.description: Defence Ordnance Safety Group (Dstl Weapons Division) chairing WSSC

nodes.label: DOSR
nodes.description: Defence OME Safety Regulator, part of Defence Safety Authority

nodes.label: NavyX
nodes.description: Royal Navy innovation and experimentation hub for technology adoption and naval USV trials

nodes.label: Centre for Assuring Autonomy (York)
nodes.description: University of York research centre - develops AMLAS/SACE; successor to AAIP

nodes.label: Safety and Suitability for Service (S3)
nodes.description: Formal evidence-based assessment that ordnance/weapon systems meet safety/environment/performance criteria for deployment

nodes.label: Insensitive Munitions Testing
nodes.description: STANAG 4439 suite (Fast Heat, Bullet Impact, Fragment Impact, Shaped Charge Jet, Drop, Sympathetic Detonation); £10k-£50k per round

nodes.label: PINN Surrogate Models
nodes.description: Physics-Informed Neural Networks embedding conservation laws; 500-1000x speedup over FE with <5% error

nodes.label: Bayesian DoE / Active Learning
nodes.description: Bayesian optimisation with acquisition functions to reduce STANAG 4439/arena trials by 25-40%

nodes.label: Arena Fragmentation Test (AFT)
nodes.description: Warhead detonation into witness panels at 5-20m radii; ~£50k-£200k per shot

nodes.label: Flash X-Ray (Scandiflash)
nodes.description: 80-1200 kV, 20-35 ns pulses; reconstructs fragment trajectory inside expanding cloud

nodes.label: Photonic Doppler Velocimetry (PDV)
nodes.description: Fibre-based laser surface/free-surface velocimetry at um/ns resolution

nodes.label: YOLO/Mask R-CNN Fragment Detection
nodes.description: Real-time bbox + instance segmentation for fragment counting on high-speed video and radiographs

nodes.label: Fragmentation Digital Twin
nodes.description: Hydrocode model calibrated via particle filter/Bayesian MCMC against observed FMD, PDV, radiograph features

nodes.label: Perception Stack Robustness Qualification (PSRQ)
nodes.description: Seven-phase pipeline for qualifying Royal Navy USV perception stacks (requirements decomposition through in-service monitoring)

nodes.label: DeFOSPAM Analysis
nodes.description: Seven-analyst (DFOSPAM) requirements validation producing 84 findings over Definitions/Features/Outcomes/Scenarios/Prediction/Ambiguity/Missing

nodes.label: Specification by Example (SBE)
nodes.description: Gerrard/Windsor pattern producing 30 ubiquitous-language terms, 40 key examples, 7 Gherkin feature files

nodes.label: IEEE 830 SRS (USV Perception)
nodes.description: AI-assisted T&E specification for Royal Navy USV perception with 16 requirements (REQ-001..REQ-016), 98 findings, AMLAS-compliant evidence

nodes.label: MIT AUVLAB Dataset
nodes.description: Marine perception dataset with radar, visual, infrared, and LiDAR from surface vessels

nodes.label: Adversarial Robustness (USV perception)
nodes.description: Certified L-infinity epsilon bounds via IBM ART/Foolbox; robust-accuracy thresholds per object class/sensor modality

nodes.label: Live Drift Detection
nodes.description: Kolmogorov-Smirnov or similar statistical monitors over >=3 declared environment variables with auto re-qualification triggers

nodes.label: Isaac Sim / VBS4 / CARLA maritime
nodes.description: Physics-accurate simulators for synthetic multi-modal sensor data (images, LiDAR, radar, IMU)

nodes.label: HIL & Digital Twin (USV)
nodes.description: Closed-loop validation of perception + collision-avoidance + handover against simulated sensor feedback; pre-sea-trial gate

nodes.label: GSN Safety Case Auto-generation
nodes.description: Auto-generated GSN claims/sub-goals from AMLAS evidence bundle; drafted in <1 engineer-day (baseline 3-7 days)

nodes.label: BUTEC Range
nodes.description: British Underwater Test and Evaluation Centre - naval range used for HIL/trial scenarios

nodes.label: CAP 722 / FLY 2000 Air Domain Graph
nodes.description: Prior knowledge graph on UK military/civil air-UAS corpus: 196 nodes, 200 edges, 27 communities across CAP 722A OSC, MAA FLY 2000, RA 2300, JSP 936

nodes.label: JSP 936 Five MOD AI Ethical Principles
nodes.description: Human centricity, Responsibility, Understanding, Bias/Harm Mitigation, Reliability

nodes.label: RPAS Category Framework (Open/S1/S2/Certified)
nodes.description: UK FLY 2000 Series RPAS categories extracted as hyperedge in air-domain graph

nodes.label: CLASS UME Performance Framework
nodes.description: DeCapua & Evans Effective Performance Engineering: Capacity, Latency, Availability, Scalability, Security, Usability, Monitoring, Endurance

nodes.label: CAA/MAA Joint Approval Workbench
nodes.description: Workbench domain NFRs: web service for applicant uploads, panel sessions, AI inference, audit, classification boundary (OFFICIAL/SENSITIVE/SECRET/STRAP)

nodes.label: BVLOS Swarm Safety-Critical Loops
nodes.description: Geofence p99<500ms; C2 tactical <1s; DAA cooperative <5s per DO-365; flight termination <500ms

nodes.label: Swarm-Aware SORA Evidence Gap
nodes.description: DeFOSPAM Dorothy-1 + Vibe finding: legacy SORA v2.0 packs lack swarm-specific failure-mode/de-confliction evidence required by JARUS SORA v2.5 Appendix C

nodes.label: Windows ARM64 workerd Limitation
nodes.description: Cloudflare workerd lacks win32-arm64 build; recommended workaround is WSL2 Ubuntu; Node/Playwright/neo4j-driver work natively

nodes.label: Cross-Domain Autonomy Assurance
nodes.description: AMLAS/SACE + JSP 936 + Article 36 form a unified assurance spine across air (UAV/BVLOS), surface (USV), subsurface (UUV), and ground (UGV) domains

nodes.label: Autonomous Perception Stack
nodes.description: Multi-modal (camera, LiDAR, radar, IR) detection + classification + tracking common to USV, UAV-DAA, and UGV autonomy

nodes.label: SORA-equivalent risk assessments
nodes.description: CAA SORA (air) conceptually mirrored by MASS Code of Practice (maritime) and PSRQ (USV perception) - all partition operational risk by ODD conditions

links.source_location: Orchestrator archetype vs Lead Inspector chair

links.note: both are Operational Safety Cases with ALARP, ASMS/SMS, Accountable Manager
both university UAS governance docs citing CAP 722A and 2019/947
both list aircraft emergency procedures (flyaway, loss of link, crash, battery fire)
both AAIB safety recommendations amending CAP 722/722A after UAS loss-of-control accident
both AAIB incident reports on UAS loss of control leading to SRs

hyperedges.label: DTFEA pillars D/T/F/E/A feed maturity gate
PDRA-01 exemption set — Scotland sample skips keystones by exemption
Keystone-gated release blocker
hyperedges.description: Keystones K1-K8 (operationalizing SORA) are enforced by Gate 9 and exercised by the twin-sample regression (Gate 8); the conjunction drives the release-readiness verdict.

hyperedges.label: Coverage adequacy (TMap + ISO 25010)
hyperedges.description: Coverage pipeline computes adequacy by aligning 194 TCs across TMap coverage groups and ISO 25010 characteristics against REQ001-REQ020.
